label: Vacancies
title: Vacancies
summary: Open roles and application details will appear here.

items.title: Mechanical and Maintenance Department
items.summary:
Aja Alloys Pvt. Ltd. invites applications for the following Mechanical and Maintenance Department positions:

1. Manager Mechanical, 1 slot
2. Mechanical Engineer, 1 slot
3. GCP Shift Operators, 4 slots
4. Welder (Shift or General), 10 slots
5. Fitter (Shift or General), 10 slots
6. Helper (Shift or General), 2 slots
7. Pump House Operator, 4 slots
8. Auto Mechanical, 2 slots

Total slots: 34.

Interested candidates may submit their application by email to info@aja.bt.
